cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalating Supernatural Threat to Child
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dana experiences a series of increasingly direct supernatural attacks centered on her baby, beginning with unexplained disturbances and culminating in a full abduction attempt by Vigo's spirit.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Oscar still bears ritual symbols, suggesting lingering supernatural risk

cross_scene_arcs.title: Maternal Protection Under Siege
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dana's primary goal shifts from managing daily life to actively defending her child as supernatural forces target Oscar, testing her resolve and resilience.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: to stop the runaway buggy and protect her child
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Dana regains physical custody of Oscar, breaking Vigo's immediate hold on him.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how to protect Oscar from Vigo's possession

cross_scene_arcs.title: Reconnection with Peter Venkman
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dana cautiously re-engages with Peter Venkman, moving from emotional distance to temporary refuge and romantic rekindling, though underlying doubts remain.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: emotional distance confirmed from Peter Venkman
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: doubt about Venkman's reliability despite attraction

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confrontation with Vigo's Presence
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dana progresses from initial awareness of Vigo's sentience to direct confrontation with his power, culminating in her defiance during his attempt to claim her child.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: first recognition of supernatural danger in the museum
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: defeats Vigo's physical hold on her baby
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: the painting is alive and watching her

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Skeptic to Committed Investigator
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Venkman transitions from mocking paranormal claims on air to becoming personally and practically involved in Dana Barrett's case, culminating in caretaking and protective actions.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: actively involved in Dana's safety and domestic well-being

cross_scene_arcs.title: Conflict with City Authority and Reversal of Power
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Venkman moves from being publicly dismissed and blocked by city officials to being recognized as the essential crisis responder, leveraging that status to demand accountability.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: denied access to political authority, publicly humiliated
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: recognized as legitimate crisis responder by city leadership
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: method of payment remains unsettled as checks are refused and cash has not yet been delivered

cross_scene_arcs.title: Leadership and Team Role Evolution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Venkman asserts increasing leadership within the team, from pushing to pursue banned investigations to directing tactical operations during critical supernatural events.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: actively defies judicial restriction on ghostbusting
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: assumes operational control during critical phase
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: potential risks of large-scale movement not yet addressed

cross_scene_arcs.title: Development of Relationship with Dana Barrett
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Venkman's connection with Dana evolves from professional curiosity to personal investment, marked by caretaking, shared domestic space, and protective responsibility.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: shifts from detached observer to active participant in Dana's situation
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: deepens connection with Dana, demonstrates caretaking role toward Oscar

cross_scene_arcs.title: Defending the Team's Legitimacy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ray reacts to public mockery by becoming defensive, then works to maintain team cohesion when Winston considers quitting, showing his investment in the Ghostbusters' credibility and survival.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: public perception of Ghostbusters as ineffective

cross_scene_arcs.title: Uncovering the Underground Threat
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ray leads the investigation into subsurface paranormal activity, confirming the Van Horne Station's existence and collecting a slime sample, which triggers a dangerous encounter.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: in immediate physical danger, suspended above sentient slime
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: nature and origin of the subsurface energy remain unidentified

cross_scene_arcs.title: Consequences and Responsibility
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ray's attempt to collect a slime sample leads to a citywide blackout, marking a shift from investigator to unintentional catalyst of large-scale crisis.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: consequences of the blackout remain unaddressed

cross_scene_arcs.title: Corruption and Recovery
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ray succumbs to the corrupting influence of supernatural slime, exhibits hostile behavior, then regains clarity and recovers physically after decontamination.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: physical and psychological aftermath of near-death experience

cross_scene_arcs.title: Operational Leadership Under Pressure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ray asserts tactical leadership during ghost containment and later operates a critical system to control the Statue of Liberty, demonstrating growing responsibility in high-stakes operations.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: regains authority to use Ghostbusting equipment
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: in control of a large-scale paranormal operation
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: risk of losing control due to the improvised control system
